pro_brother.version_description: AGP v8 with correct lyrics and chords on melody track.

recommended.version_description: Language: Bosnian/Serbian/Croatian. This chords are for the original version of the song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rL8PhTOnK5Q.

content:
It feels so good - Sonique
Capo: 1
 
[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
 
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
You always make me smile when I'm feeling down.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                         [ch]Em[/ch]
You give me such a vibe, it's totally bona fide.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
It's not the way you walk and it ain't the way you talk.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                     [ch]Em[/ch]
It ain't the job you got that keeps me satisfied.[/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
Your love, it feels so good and that's what takes me high,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
higher than before, your love, it keeps me alive.[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
Thought I should let you know that your touching means so much.[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
When I'm alone, I'm not, it's you that always makes me laugh,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
oh, oh, baby.[/tab]
 
[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Oooooh, to understand how I feel, deep inside[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Oh oh, you make me feel, all I need to feel yes, in my heart[/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
Your love, it feels so good and that's what takes me high,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
higher than before, your love, it keeps me alive.[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
Thought I should let you know that your touching means so much.[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
When I'm alone, I'm not, it's you that always makes me laugh,[/tab]
 
oh, oh, baby.
 
[Instrumental]
